title: Spicy Light Nostalgic Syrian Popcorn Stir-fry
description: A light and spicy take on a traditional Syrian dish featuring toffee popcorn with a dash of nostalgia in each bite.
instructions: Heat oil in a medium-sized pot over medium heat.
Add popcorn kernels and a pinch of salt, tossing to coat evenly. Let it pop without stirring for about 30 seconds.
While the popcorn is popping, prepare the toffee mixture by dissolving sugar in milk or water until smooth and golden brown, adding cinnamon and red pepper flakes if desired.
Drizzle the toffee mixture over the popped popcorn while it’s still warm. Stir quickly to ensure even coating.
Transfer the dish onto a serving plate and garnish with additional cinnamon powder for extra flavor and visual appeal.
